summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CarryOn estate planning platform P2 features: multi-estate support, activity timeline, and estate selector dropdown. Backend APIs fully functional (42/42 tests passed). Frontend P2 features confirmed working with estate creation, switching, and activity logging. Authentication persistence issue remains from previous iteration.

ui_bugs.issue: Frontend authentication token persistence issues causing session expiration and redirects to login page

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (pete@mitchell.com login with OTP)
Multi-estate support - create new estate endpoint
Multi-estate support - get all estates endpoint
Multi-estate support - switch between estates endpoint
Dashboard loads with estate selector dropdown
Quick action buttons (Upload Document, Create Message, Add Beneficiary, Ask Guardian)
Voice verification UI in upload modal (existing P1 feature)
All existing P1 features still functional
Document upload with voice verification lock
Document upload with backup code lock
Dashboard rendering with all P2 components
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication token persistence issue in frontend - users are being logged out too quickly and redirected to login page. This affects user experience but does not break core functionality.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (P2 features working, minor auth persistence issue)
